title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Pantaloons

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Pantaloons
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pantaloons! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pantaloons:
Pantaloons is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pantaloons!
